allow: Bash(powershell -Command "try { [System.Activator]::CreateInstance\([Type]::GetTypeFromProgID\(''IMAPI2.MsftDiscMaster2''\)\); Write-Host ''IMAPI2 OK'' } catch { Write-Host \(''IMAPI2 EROARE: '' + $_Exception.Message\) }")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_CDROMDrive | Select-Object Name, Drive, MediaLoaded, Status")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Volume -DriveLetter F | Select-Object DriveLetter, FileSystemLabel, FileSystem, Size, SizeRemaining")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''F:\\'' -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name, Length, PSIsContainer")
